display.purpose: Document title only. One per document. The moment the reader's eye anchors.

headline.purpose: Section headings (h2). Serif authority without weight.

title.purpose: Sub-section headings (h3). Bold sans registers as 'within this section'.

body.purpose: All running prose. 65–75ch max line length. The voice of the content.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, table headers, timestamps, footers. Mono tracked-out uppercase.

motion.name: hover-state
motion.purpose: The only valid transition. State changes on hover/focus elements only.

breakpoints.name: reading-max
breakpoints.purpose: Max width of the .pg reading container.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Breakpoint for two-column components (split, before/after) collapsing to single column.

components.name: Callout — Note
components.description: Informational aside. Blue tint background, no side-stripe border.
components.html: Note: This is an informational note with context or supplementary detail.
components.css: .ds-callout-note { background: #dbeafe; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #1c1917; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Callout — Warning
components.description: Caution or risk signal. Amber tint background, no side-stripe border.
components.html: Warning: Something that warrants caution before proceeding.
components.css: .ds-callout-warn { background: #fef3c7; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #1c1917; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Callout — Tip
components.description: Helpful suggestion or positive signal. Green tint background.
components.html: Tip: A helpful suggestion or something worth highlighting positively.
components.css: .ds-callout-tip { background: #dcfce7; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #1c1917; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Surface container for grouped content. Tonal lift from page, no shadow.
components.html:
Card Title

Card body text describing the grouped content.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.25rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; }

components.name: Code Block
components.description: The only fully dark surface in the palette. High contrast for technical content.
components.css: .ds-code { background: #1c1917; color: #f5f5f4; padding: 1.25rem; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; font-size: 0.85rem; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-all; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Table
components.description: Full-width data grid. Mono uppercase headers, tonal muted header row.
components.css: .ds-tbl-w { overflow-x: auto; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-tbl { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.9rem; background: #ffffff; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-tbl thead { background: #f5f5f4; } .ds-tbl th { text-align: left; padding: 0.6rem 1rem; font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #57534e; border-bottom: 1px solid #e7e5e4; } .ds-tbl td { padding: 0.6rem 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f5f5f4; color: #57534e; vertical-align: top; } .ds-tbl tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }

components.name: Stat Block
components.description: Large metric + label. Serif number in accent color. No card wrapper.
components.html:
99.9%Uptime
42msP50 Latency
components.css: .ds-stats { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-stat { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem; min-width: 140px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-stat-n { display: block; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 400; color: #2563eb; line-height: 1; } .ds-stat-l { display: block; font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #a8a29e; margin-top: 0.4rem; }

narrative.overview:
Floreo documents are the books you keep. Not dashboards, not feeds — reading artifacts meant to be consulted again weeks later when context is needed. The design system exists to make AI-generated content feel like it was worth writing.

The palette is warm stone, not clinical white. Headings speak in Georgian serif: authority without aggression. Body copy runs in system-ui: native, fast, unobtrusive. The mono face appears only where precision matters. Three voices, each in its place.

This system explicitly rejects: SaaS dashboard aesthetic, AI-generated generic output, corporate report PDF, marketing landing page patterns.
keyCharacteristics: Warm stone neutrals, never clinical white or reflexively dark
Three font stacks with strict roles: serif display, sans body, mono metadata
Accent color varies per document type; rarity is the signal
Flat surfaces with tonal depth only, no shadows
Components recede; typography and spacing carry meaning

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: The document accent appears on at most 10% of any surface. Its rarity is the signal. A document drowning in its own accent color loses its identity badge.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: All neutrals tint toward warm stone, never toward cool gray. The chroma is low (0.005–0.01 OKLCH) but measurable; the warmth is felt before it is noticed.

rules.name: The Three-Voice Rule
rules.body: Georgia for headings. System-ui for body. Courier New for metadata and code. Never mix them within a role.

rules.name: The Serif Authority Rule
rules.body: h1 and h2 are always Georgia. h3 and below switch to system-ui to signal 'within a section,' not 'a new chapter.'

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow on any document element except interactive focus rings. Shadows signal interactivity; floreo documents are read, not clicked.

dos: Do use Georgia at 2.5rem weight 400 for the document title.
Do vary the document accent (--ca) per document type.
Do keep accent use below 10% of any surface.
Do tint all neutrals warm toward stone. #1c1917 not #111111.
Do use the three-step tonal stack for the only depth mechanism.
Do max body line length at 65–75ch.
Do use Courier New uppercase for eyebrows, table headers, timestamps, and metadata.
Do embed the floreo Content Plan in <script type="application/floreo"> before </body>.
Do respect prefers-color-scheme: dark and prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right > 1px as colored accent) on callouts, cards, or list items. Background tint is the signal.
Don't use gradient text. Single solid color only.
Don't use the SaaS dashboard aesthetic — dark sidebars, metric cards, gradient accents.
Don't produce AI-generic output — uniform padding everywhere, identical card grids, no spacing rhythm.
Don't produce corporate report PDF aesthetic — gray on gray, no accent.
Don't use marketing landing page patterns — hero sections, gradient headlines, hero-metric template.
Don't use #000 or #fff. Always tint toward warm stone.
Don't animate layout properties. Only background/color transitions at 150ms ease-out.
Don't break self-containment. No external fonts, no CDN stylesheets. One .html file.
Don't add shadows to document elements.
